title: /k
summary_text: - Kernel/Main: routing + synthesis + conflict resolution (no task focus yet; hold for requirement freeze) [provider:codex] [agent:codex] [subagent:none] - Context/Explorer: fast repo-surface scan + identify the smallest “what are we doing?” clarification to ask next [provider:codex] [agent:codex] [subagent:subagent1] - Simulation: bounded rehearsal of the first plausible plan + failure modes (keep it cheap/fast) [provider:codex] [agent:codex] [subagent:subagent2] - Review/Critic: independent critique of the frozen requirement + plan coherence check [provider:glm] [agent:kglm] [subagent:none] - Specialist/Dissent: one-shot outside-voice on “are we missing an obvious angle?” before implementation [provider:gemini-cli] [agent:kgemini] [subagent:none] - Specialist/Final Check: one-shot “ship/no-ship” review once a concrete plan exists (avoid autopilot) [provider:copilot-cli] [agent:kcopilot] [subagent:none]
